description: Private accounts in Arabic script, mentioning small quantities of items such as beer (mizr), vetch (jullabān) or possibly pomegranate blossom (jullanār), cakes (kaʿk). The names mentioned are all of the form X al-Dawla, e.g., Jamāl al-Dawla... Shams al-Dawla Abū Asad... Kawkab al-Dawla... [...] al-Dawla al-Bilbaysī. Probably related to, or an indirect join with, T-S AS 177.42 (PGPID 37012).
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
